name: Squarepusher
bio: Squarepusher is Tom Jenkinson's virtuosic electronic project, blending drum programming, bass technique, and hyper-detailed production into a cult catalog.
notable_for: Breakbeat maximalism, IDM catalog depth, and strong underground recognition.
career_highlight: Tracks from the late-1990s and early-2000s remain reference points for electronic production culture.
revenue_drivers: Electronic deep-catalog listening sustains older key releases.
Production-led cult status helps tracks stay relevant in genre communities.
Reissues, live reputation, and specialty fandom support long-tail value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Squarepusher's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Squarepusher's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
